body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption 
 ## 接口描述 
批量新增数据源选项 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%8C%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%7B%22selectOptionName%22%3A%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91%22%7D%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","maxLength":"128","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B911","label":"%E4%BA%8C%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","label":"%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%7B%22selectOptionName%22%3A%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91%22%7D%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"sourceSeqId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1","required":true,"desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%8F%AF%E5%BE%97"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption?sourceSeqId=12345
```json
[  
  	{  
		"selectOptionName":"选项1",  
		"optionSaveDtoList": [
			{
				"selectOptionName":"选项11",  
				"optionSaveDtoList": [
					{
						"selectOptionName":"选项111",  
						"optionSaveDtoList": []  
					}
				]  
			}	
		]  
  	}  
]  
```
###返回示例
```json
{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":  "调用成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption

接口描述

批量新增数据源选项

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%8C%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%7B%22selectOptionName%22%3A%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91%22%7D%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","maxLength":"128","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B911","label":"%E4%BA%8C%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","label":"%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%7B%22selectOptionName%22%3A%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91%22%7D%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%B8%89%E7%BA%A7"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"sourceSeqId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1","required":true,"desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%8F%AF%E5%BE%97"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelOption?sourceSeqId=12345

[  
  	{  
		"selectOptionName":"选项1",  
		"optionSaveDtoList": [
			{
				"selectOptionName":"选项11",  
				"optionSaveDtoList": [
					{
						"selectOptionName":"选项111",  
						"optionSaveDtoList": []  
					}
				]  
			}	
		]  
  	}  
]

###返回示例

{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":  "调用成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
